component.name: DeaDBeeF
component.summary: Modular audio player with broad format support

description.p: This is a community package of DeaDBeeF, maintained independently and unaffiliated with the DeaDBeeF project. It repackages the official upstream Linux portable build unmodified.

DeaDBeeF is a modular audio player for Linux and other desktop systems. It supports common local audio formats, playlists, cue sheets, album artwork, ReplayGain, network streams, media library browsing, MPRIS integration and a plugin-based GTK interface.

Permissions: this package grants display, audio, network access, notifications, MPRIS, DeaDBeeF's runtime socket and your Music directory. Broader file access is not granted by default; enable it only if your music library lives elsewhere:

ul.li: Full local library access: flatpak override --user --filesystem=home io.sourceforge.deadbeef

description.p: Updates the bundled mpg123 dependency to 1.33.6.
